prose:
**Benzene Frontier-Orbital Calculation — HOMO–LUMO Gap**

**Method Provenance Block:**
- **Property:** HOMO–LUMO frontier orbital energy gap (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy).
- **Level of Theory:** DFT, **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (tier `standard`, density-fit via RI/RIJK)
- **Program:** PySCF
- **Geometry Provenance:** Input geometry from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/benzene/benzene.xyz` (benzene C₆H₆, 12 atoms); single-point calculation on supplied geometry (no optimization).
- **Solvent / Environment:** Gas phase (no implicit solvation)
- **Charge & Multiplicity:** Charge 0, multiplicity 1 (neutral closed-shell singlet)
- **Convergence:** SCF converged in 8 cycles ✓

**Result:**
- **HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.6310857 eV**
  - HOMO (orbital index 20) = −7.0468329 eV
  - LUMO (orbital index 21) = −0.41574728 eV

**Integrity:** ✅ **Status: ok, trustworthy = true.** All validation checks passed (energy finite, SCF converged, schema valid).

**No warnings reported.**

**Reproducibility:**
- CLI invocation: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --solvent gas-phase --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/benzene/benzene.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpg6odsl46/live.json`
- Output file: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpg6odsl46/live.json`</prose>
<parameter name="integrity_trustworthy">true
